note: Research aid, not legal advice or country approval. Only rows with permitted=true may appear in the public Permitted Territory.
inheritance_rule: Every market row inherits cross_market_evidence. A row-specific gate or source narrows or overrides the inherited UNVERIFIED result; silence never converts UNVERIFIED into approval.

cross_market_evidence.sovereign_or_legal_status: Each named country is treated as a sovereign market; Quebec is a Canadian provincial subrow and the six named U.S. territories/possessions are separate territorial rows. Excluded European and UK dependencies are outside this candidate-row set and remain out of scope.

google_play.target_audience: CONSOLE_UNVERIFIED; owner decision is Ages 18 and over only

public_developer_profile.consequence: The cross-market platform identity blocker remains unresolved until the owner verifies categorical public-display results without copying any private value.

providers.implemented_sdks: Google Mobile Ads, UMP, Google Analytics for Firebase, Firebase Crashlytics, Firebase Installations, and Firebase Sessions are evidenced in the inspected Android repositories.
providers.ump_scope: Advertising only; it does not gate Analytics, Crashlytics, Installations, Sessions, all network activity, or previously processed information.

sanctions_and_export.default: Current U.S. sanctions, export-control, provider, and prohibited-person screening remains required before enablement.

privacy_and_operator_role.operator_role: Jesus Afkerian may be treated as controller, responsible party, organization, business, or another regulated role only when the applicable law and threshold support that classification; UNVERIFIED rows make no classification claim.
privacy_and_operator_role.public_identity_elements: Each row must be satisfiable using only Jesus Afkerian, AFKERIAN INTERACTIVE, and afkerian.support@gmail.com. A mandatory public element outside that set results in EXCLUDED_BY_OWNER_PRIVACY_REQUIREMENT.
privacy_and_operator_role.nonpublic_or_external_duties: Registration, filing, fee, representative, privacy-officer, assessment, incident, governance, and complaint obligations remain UNVERIFIED unless the row gate identifies one.
privacy_and_operator_role.notice_at_collection: Existing app delivery, timing, content, and regional legal sufficiency remain UNVERIFIED outside the permitted U.S. row.
privacy_and_operator_role.legal_bases_and_consent: No universal legal basis is asserted. Advertising, identifiers, approximate location, Analytics, Crashlytics, security, and fraud-prevention rules require jurisdiction-specific review.
privacy_and_operator_role.rights: Access, correction, deletion, portability, opt-out, appeal, authorized-agent, complaint, and verification rules remain jurisdiction- and threshold-dependent.
privacy_and_operator_role.transfers: Google cross-border processing is disclosed, but market-specific safeguards, contracts, localization, adequacy, and impact assessments remain UNVERIFIED.
privacy_and_operator_role.retention_security_incidents: Provider retention settings and market-specific deletion, safeguards, breach, register, recordkeeping, and governance duties remain UNVERIFIED.

audience_and_contract.eligibility: At least 18 and the local age of majority and contractual capacity, whichever is higher; the Apps do not independently verify age.
audience_and_contract.consumer_contract: Florida law and Orange County venue, disclaimers, aggregate cap, and indemnity yield to nonwaivable consumer, privacy, language, warranty, cancellation, small-claims, forum, and remedy rights.
audience_and_contract.assent: Download, installation, access, or use after reasonably conspicuous notice is the asserted assent act; passive retention alone is not assent. In-app versioned affirmative assent is not implemented.

language_and_surfaces.website: en-US and es-419 first-party core documents are present.
language_and_surfaces.android: Only the verified en-US core destinations exist; es-419 has no authorized Android destination or presentation path.
language_and_surfaces.market_rule: A required language missing from a web, store, or in-app surface keeps the market on hold.

cross_market_evidence.default_owner_action: Do not enable production, testing, pre-registration, custom listings, campaigns, or ads until the row's exact gate, required languages, product behavior, platform identity, and console settings are resolved and approved.

status_legend.APPROVED_FOR_OWNER_ENABLEMENT: Documentary and product requirements pass; only authorized console enablement and post-launch verification remain.
status_legend.DOCUMENT_READY_CONSOLE_UNVERIFIED: Local documentary and product gates pass for the intended market, but console configuration is unverified.
status_legend.MARKET_HOLD_LEGAL_INPUT: A mandatory legal, registration, representative, officer, fee, sanctions, or counsel decision remains.
status_legend.MARKET_HOLD_LANGUAGE: A mandatory validated language or delivery surface is missing.
status_legend.MARKET_HOLD_PRODUCT_CHANGE: A required consent or product behavior needs an Android or provider-configuration change.
status_legend.MARKET_HOLD_SOURCE_UNAVAILABLE: Current primary authority could not be verified sufficiently.
status_legend.NOT_SUPPORTED_OR_SANCTIONS_REVIEW: Platform support or lawful distribution is unsupported or unresolved.
status_legend.MARKET_HOLD_PLATFORM_IDENTITY: A required platform may publicly expose a non-authorized identity or contact element.
status_legend.EXCLUDED_BY_OWNER: The owner expressly excluded the market.
status_legend.EXCLUDED_BY_OWNER_PRIVACY_REQUIREMENT: Mandatory public disclosure requires an identity or contact element outside the authorized set; no disclosure action is authorized.
status_legend.OUT_OF_SCOPE_EUROPEAN_OR_UK_TERRITORY: The territory imports an excluded European or UK regime.
